title: HEALTH CARE SERVICES - 211info
text: KLAMATH OPEN DOOR HEALTH CARE SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides health care services including annual exams (including gynecological exams), care for acute and chronic conditions, pregnancy testing, STD/STI screening, immunizations, sports physicals, mental health evaluation, health screenings, and assistance in enrolling with health insurance. 2074 S 6th Street Klamath Falls, OR 97601 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 7am-6pm. 1st, 3rd, and 5th Wednesdays of the month closed from noon-2pm. Email (541) 851-8110 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main (541) 851-8110 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and to schedule an appointment FEES: Accepts OHP, Medicare, and most private insurance. Sliding scale fees available. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable. Income information for those applying for sliding scale fees. LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Klamath and Lake Counties Services: Childhood Immunization Community Clinics Contraception General Medical Care Mental Health Evaluation Navigator Programs Pap Tests Sexually Transmitted Infection Screening Vaccine Information Other Services Offered At This Location: COUNSELING SETTINGS - BEHAVIORAL HEALTH SERVICES HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - OREGON MOTHERSCARE SPECIALTY MEDICINE - DENTAL CARE SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. KLAMATH OPEN DOOR
